name: Prescient AI Media Mix Modeling API
what_it_does: AI-powered media mix modeling (MMM) platform with API — providing probabilistic, Bayesian media mix models to measure true marketing channel ROI without relying on cookies or pixel tracking, delivering incrementality measurement, budget optimization recommendations, and scenario planning for DTC ecommerce brands.
use_cases: Querying media mix model outputs for true channel incrementality measurement
Pulling budget optimization recommendations for ad spend allocation
Running scenario planning for marketing budget decisions via API
Integrating MMM insights with BI tools for executive marketing ROI reporting
Measuring incremental revenue lift from new marketing channel tests
not_for: Real-time attribution requiring pixel/cookie tracking (Prescient is cookieless MMM)
B2B SaaS marketing attribution (Prescient is DTC ecommerce-focused)
Small brands with insufficient ad spend for statistical validity
best_when: A DTC ecommerce brand spending $500K+/month on marketing wants cookieless, incrementality-based media mix modeling to understand true channel ROI beyond last-click attribution, especially as third-party cookies deprecate.
avoid_when: You spend less than $100K/month on marketing (insufficient data for MMM), need real-time attribution, or are a B2B company without ecommerce transaction data.

auth.notes: API key from Prescient account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. No webhooks. Ad platform and ecommerce data connected via Prescient admin. Model runs are scheduled — not triggered via API. Results available post-model-run.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; minimum ad spend requirements
pricing.notes: San Diego-based company. Founded 2019. Raised $10M+. Bayesian MMM differentiator — probabilistic confidence intervals vs point estimates. Cookieless measurement future-proof vs pixel-dependent tools. Incrementality testing built-in. Budget scenario simulator. Minimum ~$500K/month ad spend recommended for model validity. Popular with high-growth DTC brands.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for model results, channel contributions, and budget recommendations. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. MMM models run on weekly/biweekly schedule — results not real-time. Model outputs include probabilistic confidence intervals. Budget optimizer requires model completion before scenarios can run.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Model result reads fully idempotent. Channel contribution reads idempotent. Budget recommendation reads idempotent by model run.
known_agent_gotchas: MMM runs weekly/biweekly — not real-time attribution
Minimum ad spend requirement — insufficient spend invalidates statistical models
Model ramp-up: 6-8 weeks of data required before first model is valid
Budget recommendations are model outputs — validate before automated implementation
Annual contract required — significant commitment before API integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Marketing spend and revenue data is competitively sensitive — restrict API access. Ad platform data aggregated for modeling — individual user data not stored. Cookieless design reduces PII risk.
